Richardson demanded an immedi-
ate preliminary hearing. Under
the law it must be had within two
days after arraignment. The at
torneys agreed that cases go over
to the 9th.


Richardson demanded that prose
cution produce the names of wit
nesses by which proof of the
charges would be established, but
the court overruled on the ground
that the prosecution alleged they
had three witnesses who would
corroborate the affidavit of the pro-
scouting attorney.
